title: Wire a hybrid lexical+vector retriever
description: Steps to run BM25 and vector retrieval in parallel and fuse them with tuned reciprocal rank fusion.
body: Use when assembling a retriever that needs both exact and semantic matching. Do not concatenate raw scores from the two retrievers — their scales are incomparable. Actions: issue the query to BM25 and the vector index in parallel, fuse the two ranked lists with reciprocal rank fusion, tune the RRF constant or weights on a labeled set, and benchmark against each component alone. Validation signals include fused recall exceeding both single-mode baselines and a recorded fusion configuration. Risk boundary: a misweighted fusion can underperform a single retriever; if the fused result does not beat both baselines, treat it as misconfigured and escalate to re-tune before release.
